title: Crumble Semolina Pudding
description: A rich and comforting dessert made with semolina, perfect for a chilly evening. This crumble semolina pudding is a twist on the classic Italian dessert.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring the milk to a simmer over medium heat.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the semolina, sugar, and eggs.
Gradually pour the semolina mixture into the milk, whisking constantly.
Return the saucepan to medium heat and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the melted buttery and vanilla extract.
Pour the pudding mixture into small ramekins or individual serving cups.
Top each ramekin with crumble mixture.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the pudding is set.
Serve warm, topped with additional crumble if desired.
